top_signals.title: S&P 500 Bulls Power Longest Weekly Gain Since 2023: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes for a deal between the US and Iran that will turn a fragile ceasefire into lasting peace fueled Wall Street optimism, driving stocks to their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leading roofing manufacturer uses AI to speed network optimization
top_signals.summary:
GAF’s Marianna Vydrevich said AI-powered analytics are helping supply chain teams automate workflows, optimize inventory and model disruptions.

The post Leading roofing manufacturer uses AI to speed network optimization  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
